catalog.title: Meetings
catalog.empty: No meetings yet. Upload a recording to get started.

detail.title: Title
detail.deleteConfirmBody: This action cannot be undone. The recording, transcript and protocol will be permanently deleted.

delete.confirmBody: This action cannot be undone. The recording, transcript and protocol will be permanently deleted.
delete.inFlightWarning: A job is currently in progress and will be marked as failed.
delete.successBody: The meeting and all its data have been removed.
delete.errorBody: Could not delete the meeting. Please try again.

retry.confirmBody: This will re-run the failed stage. The meeting will return to its in-progress state.
retry.conflictBody: The meeting is no longer in a failed state or a retry is already running.
retry.errorBody: Could not start retry. Please try again.

protocol.unsavedChangesWarning: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved changes
unsavedChanges.body: You have unsaved changes. If you leave now, your changes will be lost.

upload.title: Upload Recording
upload.dragDrop: Drag & drop a video or audio file here
upload.supported: Supported: MP4, MKV, MOV, MP3, WAV, M4A (up to 10 GB)
upload.heading: Upload meeting video
upload.fieldFile: Video file (MP4 / MKV / MOV / WEBM, max 1 GB)
upload.fieldSpeakerCountHint: Set the exact number of speakers if known — improves diarization.
upload.errorSpeakerCountRange: Speaker count must be between 1 and 10.
upload.errorFileTooLarge: File exceeds 1 GB limit. Please choose a smaller file.
upload.errorUnsupportedMime: Unsupported file type. Please upload an MP4, MKV, MOV, or WEBM file.
